title: Remove more dependency on specific quantities

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
This is a followup PR for #3815 that adds the next `JacobianAlgorithm` from #2730 -- the automatic dense Jacobian with LU factorization.

## Content

- Add ForwardDiff as a dependency, and bump ClimaComms to 0.6.8 to use the new `@threaded` macro
- Add the `AutoDenseJacobian`, which uses dual numbers to compute a dense representation of the Jacobian matrix, factorizes the matrix with `parallel_lu_factorize!`, and solves each linear system with `parallel_lu_solve!`
  - The computation of the dense matrix needs to be done in batches to avoid excessive compilation times
  - The general strategy for initializing the dual numbers and translating them into dense matrix entries will be similar for the upcoming `AutoSparseJacobian`
- Add some utility functions for defining custom kernels in `autodiff_utils.jl`, which will also be needed for `AutoSparseJacobian`
- Move code that is used for both `ManualSparseJacobian` and `AutoDenseJacobian` into a separate `jacobian.jl` file
- Override the method for `sqrt` from ForwardDiff so that the derivative of `x * sqrt(x)` at `x = 0` is `0` rather than `NaN`
- Remove some unnecessary `FT` conversions from `vertical_diffusion_boundary_layer_tendency!`, since they break when `FT` is a dual number
- Change `sgs_weight_function` so that it doesn't generate `NaN`s when evaluated with dual numbers
- Fix an accidental conversion to `Float64` in `smagorinsky_lilly_length`
- Add two new config arguments for using `AutoDenseJacobian`:
  - `use_dense_jacobian`, which replaces`ManualSparseJacobian` with `AutoDenseJacobian`
  - `update_jacobian_every`, which switches between updating once every timestep, every timestepper stage, and every linear solve (the latter has been our default choice so far, but it is not very performant for `AutoDenseJacobian`)
- Add several tests to the CI pipeline that run representative examples with `use_dense_jacobian: true` and `update_jacobian_every: dt`
- Fix header formatting in `api.md`

<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/

- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Add AutoDenseJacobian algorithm for implicit solver
